page: Microsoft Azure DC32as_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCasv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. The instance features 32 dedicated virtual CPUs and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server configuration is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. The instance does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the hardware is explicitly Premium Storage capable. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance.

Operating with a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the DC32as_v6 offers a standard general-purpose hardware profile. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention. This resource distribution makes the instance suitable for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded application servers, medium-sized databases utilizing external premium storage, and enterprise backend systems that do not require local scratch space or hardware acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DC32as_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DCasv6 family, powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides 32 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not feature any local storage, relying instead on its Premium Storage capability for external disk attachments, and contains no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource density, this server is designed for consistent performance in multi-threaded applications, enterprise web serving, and database workloads utilizing external storage. It offers a cost-efficient profile for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources without the overhead of local NVMe drives.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC32as_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, optimized for consistent enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated AMD-powered virtual machine offering balanced compute and memory resources with premium external storage compatibility for enterprise workloads.
